callGraph.callee:
localDb
			.select({
				workspaceName: workspaces.name,
				projectId: workspaces.projectId,
				projectName: projects.name,
			})
			.from(workspaces)
			.leftJoin(projects, eq(projects.id, workspaces.projectId))
			.where(eq(workspaces.id, workspaceId))
			.get

localDb
			.select({
				workspaceName: workspaces.name,
				projectId: workspaces.projectId,
				projectName: projects.name,
			})
			.from(workspaces)
			.leftJoin(projects, eq(projects.id, workspaces.projectId))
			.where

localDb
			.select({
				workspaceName: workspaces.name,
				projectId: workspaces.projectId,
				projectName: projects.name,
			})
			.from(workspaces)
			.leftJoin

localDb
			.select({
				workspaceName: workspaces.name,
				projectId: workspaces.projectId,
				projectName: projects.name,
			})
			.from

this.historyManager
					.initHistoryWriter({
						paneId,
						workspaceId,
						cwd: sessionCwd,
						cols: effectiveCols,
						rows: effectiveRows,
						initialScrollback,

this.initHistoryWriter({

					initialScrollback: contentAfterClear || undefined,
